li.p: Consider which is greater: 99 - 44 or 44 - 99\text{?} To make the largest value for x\text{,} you must put 44 in the left blank and 99 in the right blank because you solve this equation by subtracting 44 from both sides. This makes x = 99 - 44\text{,} which is the largest possible value for x\text{.}

Consider which is larger: \frac{99}{44} or \frac{44}{99}\text{?} To make the largest value for x\text{,} you must put 99 in the left blank and 44 in the right blank because you solve this equation by dividing both sides by 44. This makes x = \frac{99}{44}\text{,} which is the largest possible value for x\text{.}
